title: Fillbach Brothers
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Brothers}}
[[File:Fillbach_brothers.jpg|thumb|250px|Matthew and Shawn Fillbach.]]
The '''Fillbach Brothers''' ([[Matthew Fillbach|Matthew]] and [[Shawn Fillbach|Shawn]]) wrote and illustrated several [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] comics, as well as doing the covers for them.

{{Artist-stub}}
